## v3.2.5 — metadata, discovery, and company-led Cloud routing
Align public metadata, release proof, and hosted buyer-routing around the current company-led Slack MCP Cloud surface.

### Improved
- aligned `package.json`, `package-lock.json`, `server.json`, and `glama.json` on `3.2.5`
- refreshed public README, Pages, and docs for hosted product surface
- added a checked distribution ledger for MCP Registry, Glama, mcp.so, PulseMCP, and Smithery
- tightened release-health and runbook guidance

### Compatibility
- No MCP tool or transport schema changes

### Verify
```bash
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --version
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --setup
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --status
node scripts/check-version-parity.js --allow-propagation
```

### Support
- Self-host bugs and docs fixes: GitHub issues with exact version, runtime mode, and error output
- Hosted: [mcp.revasserlabs.com](https://mcp.revasserlabs.com)

Operated by Revasser. Self-host issues stay on GitHub; hosted support stays on `https://mcp.revasserlabs.com`.
